zh.East Down, Devon, England: 英國戴文易亞斯特 唐
zh.lifeSummary: John Pyne是Nicholas Pyne和Elizabeth Chichester的兒子，於1534年出生在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐。他於1554年7月10日與Honor Penfound在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1572年在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐。

zh-hans.East Down, Devon, England: 英国戴文易亞斯特 唐
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Pyne是Nicholas Pyne和Elizabeth Chichester的儿子，于1534年出生在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐。他于1554年7月10日与Honor Penfound在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1572年在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐。

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: John Pyne was born in 1534, in East Down, Devon, England as the son of Nicholas Pyne and Elizabeth Chichester. He married Honor Penfound on 10 July 1554, in East Down, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1572, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in East Down, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Pyne est né en 1534, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Nicholas Pyne et Elizabeth Chichester. Il a épousé Honor Penfound le 10 juillet 1554, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1572, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à East Down, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Pyne wurde 1534 in East Down, Devon, England, als Sohn von Nicholas Pyne und Elizabeth Chichester geboren. Er hat am 10. Juli 1554 in East Down, Devon, England Honor Penfound geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1572 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Down, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Pyne è nato il nel 1534 nel East Down, Devon, England come figlio di Nicholas Pyne e Elizabeth Chichester. Lui sposato Honor Penfound il 10 luglio 1554, nel East Down, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1572, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a East Down, Devon, England.

ja.East Down, Devon, England: イギリスデボンエアスト ダウン
ja.lifeSummary: John Pyneは1534年にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンでNicholas PyneとElizabeth Chichesterの息子として生まれた。1554年7月10日にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンでHonor Penfoundと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1572年に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエアスト ダウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pyne(은)는 1534년 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 Nicholas Pyne(와)과 Elizabeth Chichester의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1554년 7월 10일 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 Honor Penfound(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Pyne nasceu em 1534, em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra filho de Nicholas Pyne e Elizabeth Chichester. Ele casou-se com Honor Penfound em 10 de julho de 1554, em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1572, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Pyne родился в 1534 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия. Его родителей звали Nicholas Pyne и Elizabeth Chichester. Он женился на женщине по имени Honor Penfound 10 июля 1554 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1572 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Pyne nació en 1534, en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de Nicholas Pyne y Elizabeth Chichester. Se casó con Honor Penfound el 10 de julio de 1554, en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1572, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra.
